title: 📋 Note Templates — paste into Obsidian
body: Blank engagement-notes templates. Navigate to the one you want and hit the obsidian button — it copies that template's markdown verbatim (no technique scaffolding), ready to paste into your vault. These are for capturing what you find: hosts, services, users, creds, progress.
cmd:
# Pick a template below, then hit the obsidian button to copy it.
#   engagement -> full multi-host engagement sheet
#   host       -> single-host siren breakdown (ports/services/users/proof)
#   creds      -> credentials + reuse tracker
warn: The obsidian button copies these templates as-is. On any normal technique node it still does the per-node export — only template nodes paste verbatim.
